content: Reviewed the wedge trajectory and recommending a refined task prompt.

function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"action":"refine_prompt","diagnosis":"Developer burned its TDD cycle budget repeating the same approach without inspecting the failing test output. Pattern: the trajectory shows 3+ identical bash invocations with the same sed expression, all failing. Refining the prompt to point at heredoc rewrites would let the agent step out of the loop.","refined_prompt":"Re-read the failing test output before editing again. Use a heredoc-style write (cat > file <<EOF), not in-place sed — the prior trajectory shows the sed approach failing identically 3 times. Address ONLY the specific failure named in the prior feedback; do not refactor adjacent code.","recovery_succeeded":true}
